message: Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out.
author: Robert Collier

message: The future depends on what you do today.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

message: It always seems impossible until it's done.
author: Nelson Mandela

message: Genius is one percent inspiration and ninety-nine percent perspiration.
author: Thomas Edison

message: Our greatest weakness lies in giving up.
author: Thomas Edison

message: The important thing is not to stop questioning.
author: Albert Einstein

message: Learn from yesterday, live for today, hope for tomorrow.
author: Albert Einstein

message: You never fail until you stop trying.
author: Albert Einstein

message: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world.
author: Nelson Mandela

message: The expert in anything was once a beginner.
author: Helen Hayes
